Training with DiMA results in a 37% reduction in the L2 trajectory error and an 80% reduction in the collision rate of the vision-based planner, as well as a 44% trajectory error reduction in long-tail scenarios. \ours also achieves state-of-the-art performance on the nuScenes planning benchmark.

papers.title: CALICO: Part-Focused Semantic Co-Segmentation with Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have enabled general-purpose vision tasks through visual instruction tuning. While existing LVLMs can generate segmentation masks from text prompts for single images, they struggle with segmentation-grounded reasoning across images, especially at finer granularities such as object parts. In this paper, we introduce the new task of part-focused semantic co-segmentation, which involves identifying and segmenting common objects and their constituent common and unique parts across images. To address this task, we present CALICO, the first LVLM designed for multi-image part-level reasoning segmentation. CALICO features two key components, a novel Correspondence Extraction Module that identifies semantic part-level correspondences, and Correspondence Adaptation Modules that embed this information into the LVLM to facilitate multi-image understanding in a parameter-efficient manner. To support training and evaluation, we curate MixedParts, a large-scale multi-image segmentation dataset containing 2.4M samples across 44K images spanning diverse object and part categories. Experimental results demonstrate that CALICO, with just 0.3% of its parameters finetuned, achieves strong performance on this challenging task.

papers.title: Distilling Spectral Graph for Object-Context Aware Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation (OVSS) has advanced with recent vision-language models (VLMs), enabling segmentation beyond predefined categories through various learning schemes. Notably, training-free methods offer scalable, easily deployable solutions for handling unseen data, a key goal of OVSS. Yet, a critical issue persists: lack of object-level context consideration when segmenting complex objects in the challenging environment of OVSS based on arbitrary query prompts. This oversight limits models' ability to group semantically consistent elements within object and map them precisely to user-defined arbitrary classes. In this work, we introduce a novel approach that overcomes this limitation by incorporating object-level contextual knowledge within images. Specifically, our model enhances intra-object consistency by distilling spectral-driven features from vision foundation models into the attention mechanism of the visual encoder, enabling semantically coherent components to form a single object mask. Additionally, we refine the text embeddings with zero-shot object presence likelihood to ensure accurate alignment with the specific objects represented in the images. By leveraging object-level contextual knowledge, our proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance with strong generalizability across diverse datasets.

papers.title: Parameter-efficient Fine-tuning in Hyperspherical Space for Open-vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation seeks to label each pixel in an image with arbitrary text descriptions. Vision-language foundation models, especially CLIP, have recently emerged as powerful tools for acquiring open-vocabulary capabilities. However, fine-tuning CLIP to equip it with pixel-level prediction ability often suffers three issues: 1) high computational cost, 2) misalignment between the two inherent modalities of CLIP, and 3) degraded generalization ability on unseen categories. To address these issues, we propose \alg, a symmetrical parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) strategy conducted in hyperspherical space for both of the two CLIP modalities. Specifically, the PEFT strategy is achieved by a series of efficient block-diagonal learnable transformation matrices and a dual cross-relation communication module among all learnable matrices. Since the PEFT strategy is conducted symmetrically to the two CLIP modalities, the misalignment between them is mitigated. Furthermore, we apply an additional constraint to PEFT on the CLIP text encoder according to the hyperspherical energy principle, i.e., minimizing hyperspherical energy during fine-tuning preserves the intrinsic structure of the original parameter space, to prevent the destruction of the generalization ability offered by the CLIP text encoder. Extensive evaluations across various benchmarks show that H-CLIP achieves new SOTA open-vocabulary semantic segmentation results while only requiring updating approximately 4% of the total parameters of CLIP.

papers.title: SemiDAViL: Semi-supervised Domain Adaptation with Vision-Language Guidance for Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Domain Adaptation (DA) and Semi-supervised Learning (SSL) converge in Semi-supervised Domain Adaptation (SSDA), where the objective is to transfer knowledge from a source domain to a target domain using a combination of limited labeled target samples and abundant unlabeled target data. Although intuitive, a simple amalgamation of DA and SSL is suboptimal in semantic segmentation due to two major reasons: (1) previous methods, while able to learn good segmentation boundaries, are prone to confuse classes with similar visual appearance due to limited supervision; and (2) skewed and imbalanced training data distribution preferring source representation learning whereas impeding from exploring limited information about tailed classes. Language guidance can serve as a pivotal semantic bridge, facilitating robust class discrimination and mitigating visual ambiguities by leveraging the rich semantic relationships encoded in pre-trained language models to enhance feature representations across domains. Therefore, we propose the first language-guided SSDA setting for semantic segmentation in this work. Specifically, we harness the semantic generalization capabilities inherent in vision-language models (VLMs) to establish a synergistic framework within the SSDA paradigm. To address the inherent class-imbalance challenges in long-tailed distributions, we introduce class-balanced segmentation loss formulations that effectively regularize the learning process. Through extensive experimentation across diverse domain adaptation scenarios, our approach demonstrates substantial performance improvements over contemporary state-of-the-art (SoTA) methodologies.

papers.title: Repurposing Stable Diffusion Attention for Training-Free Unsupervised Interactive Segmentation
papers.abstract: Recent progress in interactive point prompt based Image Segmentation allows to significantly reduce the manual effort to obtain high quality semantic labels. State-of-the-art unsupervised methods use self-supervised pre-trained models to obtain pseudo-labels which are used in training a prompt-based segmentation model. In this paper, we propose a novel unsupervised and training-free approach based solely on the self-attention of Stable Diffusion. We interpret the self-attention tensor as a Markov transition operator, which enables us to iteratively construct a Markov chain. Pixel-wise counting of the required number of iterations along the Markov chain to reach a relative probability threshold yields a Markov-iteration-map, which we simply call a Markov-map. Compared to the raw attention maps, we show that our proposed Markov-map has less noise, sharper semantic boundaries and more uniform values within semantically similar regions. We integrate the Markov-map in a simple yet effective truncated nearest neighbor framework to obtain interactive point prompt based segmentation. Despite being training-free, we experimentally show that our approach yields excellent results in terms of Number of Clicks (NoC), even outperforming state-of-the-art training based unsupervised methods in most of the datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/mkarmann/m2n2.

papers.title: LPOSS: Label Propagation Over Patches and Pixels for Open-vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: We propose a training-free method for open-vocabulary semantic segmentation using Vision-and-Language Models (VLMs). Our approach enhances the initial per-patch predictions of VLMs through label propagation, which jointly optimizes predictions by incorporating patch-to-patch relationships. Since VLMs are primarily optimized for cross-modal alignment and not for intra-modal similarity, we use a Vision Model (VM) that is observed to better capture these relationships. We address resolution limitations inherent to patch-based encoders by applying label propagation at the pixel level as a refinement step, significantly improving segmentation accuracy near class boundaries. Our method, called LPOSS+, performs inference over the entire image, avoiding window-based processing and thereby capturing contextual interactions across the full image. LPOSS+ achieves state-of-the-art performance among training-free methods, across a diverse set of datasets. Code: https://github.com/vladan-stojnic/LPOSS

papers.title: DPSeg: Dual-Prompt Cost Volume Learning for Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation aims to segment images into distinct semantic regions for both seen and unseen categories at the pixel level. Current methods utilize text embeddings from pre-trained vision-language models like CLIP but struggle with the inherent domain gap between image and text embeddings, even after extensive alignment during training. Additionally, relying solely on deep text-aligned features limits shallow-level feature guidance, which is crucial for detecting small objects and fine details, ultimately reducing segmentation accuracy. To address these limitations, we propose a dual prompting framework, DPSeg, for this task. Our approach combines dual-prompt cost volume generation, a cost volume-guided decoder, and a semantic-guided prompt refinement strategy that leverages our dual prompting scheme to mitigate alignment issues in visual prompt generation. By incorporating visual embeddings from a visual prompt encoder, our approach reduces the domain gap between text and image embeddings while providing multi-level guidance through shallow features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches on multiple public datasets.

papers.title: An End-to-End Robust Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation Network with Single-Step Conditional Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Existing conditional Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPMs) with a Noise-Conditional Framework (NCF) remain challenging for 3D scene understanding tasks, as the complex geometric details in scenes increase the difficulty of fitting the gradients of the data distribution (the scores) from semantic labels. This also results in longer training and inference time for DDPMs compared to non-DDPMs. From a different perspective, we delve deeply into the model paradigm dominated by the Conditional Network. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end robust semantic Segmentation Network based on a Conditional-Noise Framework (CNF) of DDPMs, named CDSegNet. Specifically, CDSegNet models the Noise Network (NN) as a learnable noise-feature generator. This enables the Conditional Network (CN) to understand 3D scene semantics under multi-level feature perturbations, enhancing the generalization in unseen scenes. Meanwhile, benefiting from the noise system of DDPMs, CDSegNet exhibits strong robustness for data noise and sparsity in experiments. Moreover, thanks to CNF, CDSegNet can generate the semantic labels in a single-step inference like non-DDPMs, due to avoiding directly fitting the scores from semantic labels in the dominant network of CDSegNet. On public indoor and outdoor benchmarks, CDSegNet significantly outperforms existing methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

papers.title: BFANet: Revisiting 3D Semantic Segmentation with Boundary Feature Analysis
papers.abstract: 3D semantic segmentation plays a fundamental and crucial role to understand 3D scenes. While contemporary state-of-the-art techniques predominantly concentrate on elevating the overall performance of 3D semantic segmentation based on general metrics (e.g. mIoU, mAcc, and oAcc), they unfortunately leave the exploration of challenging regions for segmentation mostly neglected. In this paper, we revisit 3D semantic segmentation through a more granular lens, shedding light on subtle complexities that are typically overshadowed by broader performance metrics. Concretely, we have delineated 3D semantic segmentation errors into four comprehensive categories as well as corresponding evaluation metrics tailored to each. Building upon this categorical framework, we introduce an innovative 3D semantic segmentation network called BFANet that incorporates detailed analysis of semantic boundary features. First, we design the boundary-semantic module to decouple point cloud features into semantic and boundary features, and fuse their query queue to enhance semantic features with attention. Second, we introduce a more concise and accelerated boundary pseudo-label calculation algorithm, which is 3.9 times faster than the state-of-the-art, offering compatibility with data augmentation and enabling efficient computation in training. Extensive experiments on benchmark data indicate the superiority of our BFANet model, confirming the significance of emphasizing the four uniquely designed metrics. Code is available at https://github.com/weiguangzhao/BFANet.

papers.title: Exploring CLIP's Dense Knowledge for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation (WSSS) with image-level labels aims to achieve pixel-level predictions using Class Activation Maps (CAMs). Recently, Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has been introduced in WSSS. However, recent methods primarily focus on image-text alignment for CAM generation, while CLIP's potential in patch-text alignment remains unexplored. In this work, we propose ExCEL to explore CLIP's dense knowledge via a novel patch-text alignment paradigm for WSSS. Specifically, we propose Text Semantic Enrichment (TSE) and Visual Calibration (VC) modules to improve the dense alignment across both text and vision modalities. To make text embeddings semantically informative, our TSE module applies Large Language Models (LLMs) to build a dataset-wide knowledge base and enriches the text representations with an implicit attribute-hunting process. To mine fine-grained knowledge from visual features, our VC module first proposes Static Visual Calibration (SVC) to propagate fine-grained knowledge in a non-parametric manner. Then Learnable Visual Calibration (LVC) is further proposed to dynamically shift the frozen features towards distributions with diverse semantics. With these enhancements, ExCEL not only retains CLIP's training-free advantages but also significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art methods with much less training cost on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO. Code is available at https://github.com/zwyang6/ExCEL.

papers.title: Dual Semantic Guidance for Open Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation aims to enable models to segment arbitrary categories. Currently, though pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) like CLIP have established a robust foundation for this task by learning to match text and image representations from large-scale data, their lack of pixel-level recognition necessitates further fine-tuning. Most existing methods leverage text as a guide to achieve pixel-level recognition. However, the inherent biases in text semantic descriptions and the lack of pixel-level supervisory information make it challenging to fine-tune CLIP-based models effectively. This paper considers leveraging image-text data to simultaneously capture the semantic information contained in both image and text, thereby constructing Dual Semantic Guidance and corresponding pixel-level pseudo annotations. Particularly, the visual semantic guidance is enhanced via explicitly exploring foreground regions and minimizing the influence of background. The dual semantic guidance is then jointly utilized to fine-tune CLIP-based segmentation models, achieving decent fine-grained recognition capabilities. As the comprehensive evaluation shows, our method outperforms state-of-art results with large margins, on eight commonly used datasets with/without background.

papers.title: Multi-Label Prototype Visual Spatial Search for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Existing Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation (WSSS) relies on the CNN-based Class Activation Map (CAM) and Transformer-based self-attention map to generate class-specific masks for semantic segmentation. However, CAM and self-attention maps usually cause incomplete segmentation due to classification bias issue. To address this issue, we propose a Multi-Label Prototype Visual Spatial Search (MuP-VSS) method with a spatial query mechanism, which learns a set of learnable class token vectors as queries to search the similarity visual tokens from image patch tokens. Specifically, MuP-VSS consists of two key components: multi-label prototype representation and multi-label prototype optimization. The former designs a global embedding to learn the global tokens from the images, and then proposes a Prototype Embedding Module (PEM) to interact with patch tokens to understand the local semantic information. The latter utilizes the exclusivity and consistency principles of the multi-label prototypes to design three prototype losses to optimize them, which contain cross-class prototype (CCP) contrastive loss, cross-image prototype (CIP) contrastive loss, and patch-to-prototype (P2P) consistency loss. CCP loss models exclusivity of multi-label prototypes learned from a single image to enhance the discriminative properties of each class better. CCP loss learns the consistency of the same class-specific prototypes extracted from multiple images to enhance the semantic consistency. P2P loss is proposed to control the semantic response of the prototype to the image patches. Experimental results on Pascal VOC 2012 and MS COCO show that MuP-VSS significantly outperforms recent methods and achieves state-of-the-art performance.

papers.title: Scaling up Image Segmentation across Data and Tasks
papers.abstract: Traditional segmentation models, while effective in isolated tasks, often fail to generalize to more complex and open-ended segmentation problems, such as free-form, open-vocabulary, and in-the-wild scenarios. To bridge this gap, we propose to scale up image segmentation across diverse datasets and tasks such that the knowledge across different tasks and datasets can be integrated while improving the generalization ability. QueryMeldNet, a novel segmentation framework, is introduced and designed to scale seamlessly across both data size and task diversity. It is built upon a dynamic object query mechanism called query meld, which fuses different types of queries using cross-attention. This hybrid approach enables the model to balance between instance- and stuff-level segmentation, providing enhanced scalability for handling diverse object types. We further enhance scalability by leveraging synthetic data-generating segmentation masks and captions for pixel-level and open-vocabulary tasks-drastically reducing the need for costly human annotations. By training on multiple datasets and tasks at scale, QueryMeldNet continuously improves performance as the volume and diversity of data and tasks increase. It exhibits strong generalization capabilities, boosting performance in open-set segmentation tasks SeginW by 7 points. These advancements mark a key step toward universal, scalable segmentation models capable of addressing the demands of real-world applications.

papers.title: MPDrive: Improving Spatial Understanding with Marker-Based Prompt Learning for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Autonomous driving visual question answering (AD-VQA) aims to answer questions related to perception, prediction, and planning based on given driving scene images, heavily relying on the model's spatial understanding capabilities. Prior works typically express spatial information through textual representations of coordinates, resulting in semantic gaps between visual coordinate representations and textual descriptions. This oversight hinders the accurate transmission of spatial information and increases the expressive burden. To address this, we propose a novel Marker-based Prompt learning framework (MPDrive), which represents spatial coordinates by concise visual markers, ensuring linguistic expressive consistency and enhancing the accuracy of both visual perception and spatial expression in AD-VQA. Specifically, we create marker images by employing a detection expert to overlay object regions with numerical labels, converting complex textual coordinate generation into straightforward text-based visual marker predictions. Moreover, we fuse original and marker images as scene-level features and integrate them with detection priors to derive instance-level features. By combining these features, we construct dual-granularity visual prompts that stimulate the LLM's spatial perception capabilities. Extensive experiments on the DriveLM and CODA-LM datasets show that MPDrive achieves state-of-the-art performance, particularly in cases requiring sophisticated spatial understanding.

papers.title: EvOcc: Accurate Semantic Occupancy for Automated Driving Using Evidence Theory
papers.abstract: We present EvOcc, a novel evidential semantic occupancy mapping framework. It consists of two parts: (1) an evidential approach for calculating the ground-truth 3D semantic occupancy maps from noisy LiDAR measurements, and (2) a method for training image-based occupancy estimation models through a new loss formulation. In contrast to state-of-the-art semantic occupancy maps, our approach explicitly models the uncertainty introduced by unobserved spaces or contradicting measurements and we show that using it results in significantly stronger models. Evaluated as ray-based mIoU, our evidential semantic occupancy mapping approach improves over the baselines by at least 15.8\% for the ground truth and 5.5\% for the trained model. Overall, we make a significant contribution towards more detailed and uncertainty-aware 3D environment understanding and safe operation in autonomous driving.

papers.title: S4-Driver: Scalable Self-Supervised Driving Multimodal Large Language Model with Spatio-Temporal Visual Representation
papers.abstract: The latest advancements in multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have spurred a strong renewed interest in end-to-end motion planning approaches for autonomous driving. Many end-to-end approaches rely on human annotations to learn intermediate perception and prediction tasks, while purely self-supervised approaches--which directly learn from sensor inputs to generate planning trajectories without human annotations--often underperform the state of the art. We observe a key gap in the input representation space: end-to-end approaches built on MLLMs are often pretrained with reasoning tasks in 2D image space rather than the native 3D space in which autonomous vehicles plan. To this end, we propose S4-Driver, a scalable self-supervised motion planning algorithm with spatio-temporal visual representation, based on the popular PaLI multimodal large language model. S4-Driver uses a novel sparse volume strategy to seamlessly transform the strong visual representation of MLLMs from perspective view to 3D space without the need to finetune the vision encoder. This representation aggregates multi-view and multi-frame visual inputs and enables better prediction of planning trajectories in 3D space. To validate our method, we run experiments on both nuScenes and Waymo Open Motion Dataset (with in-house camera data). Results show that S4-Driver performs favorably against existing supervised multi-task approaches while requiring no human annotations. It also demonstrates great scalability when pretrained on large volumes of unannotated driving logs.

papers.title: Resilient Sensor Fusion Under Adverse Sensor Failures via Multi-Modal Expert Fusion
papers.abstract: Modern autonomous driving perception systems utilize complementary multi-modal sensors, such as LiDAR and cameras. Although sensor fusion architectures enhance performance in challenging environments, they still suffer significant performance drops under severe sensor failures, such as LiDAR beam reduction, LiDAR drop, limited field of view, camera drop, and occlusion. This limitation stems from inter-modality dependencies in current sensor fusion frameworks. In this study, we introduce an efficient and robust LiDAR-camera 3D object detector, referred to as MoME, which can achieve robust performance through a mixture of experts approach. Our MoME fully decouples modality dependencies using three parallel expert decoders, which use camera features, LiDAR features, or a combination of both to decode object queries, respectively. We propose Multi-Expert Decoding (MED) framework, where each query is decoded selectively using one of three expert decoders. MoME utilizes an Adaptive Query Router (AQR) to select the most appropriate expert decoder for each query based on the quality of camera and LiDAR features. This ensures that each query is processed by the best-suited expert, resulting in robust performance across diverse sensor failure scenarios. We evaluated the performance of MoME on the nuScenes-R benchmark. Our MoME achieved state-of-the-art performance in extreme weather and sensor failure conditions, significantly outperforming the existing models across various sensor failure scenarios.

papers.title: Exact: Exploring Space-Time Perceptive Clues for Weakly Supervised Satellite Image Time Series Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Automated crop mapping through Satellite Image Time Series (SITS) has emerged as a crucial avenue for agricultural monitoring and management. However, due to the low resolution and unclear parcel boundaries, annotating pixel-level masks is exceptionally complex and time-consuming in SITS. This paper embraces the weakly supervised paradigm (i.e., only image-level categories available) to liberate the crop mapping task from the exhaustive annotation burden. The unique characteristics of SITS give rise to several challenges in weakly supervised learning: (1) noise perturbation from spatially neighboring regions, and (2) erroneous semantic bias from anomalous temporal periods. To address the above difficulties, we propose a novel method, termed exploring space-time perceptive clues (Exact). First, we introduce a set of spatial clues to explicitly capture the representative patterns of different crops from the most class-relative regions. Besides, we leverage the temporal-to-class interaction of the model to emphasize the contributions of pivotal clips, thereby enhancing the model perception for crop regions. Build upon the space-time perceptive clues, we derive the clue-based CAMs to effectively supervise the SITS segmentation network. Our method demonstrates impressive performance on various SITS benchmarks. Remarkably, the segmentation network trained on Exact-generated masks achieves 95% of its fully supervised performance, showing the bright promise of weakly supervised paradigm in crop mapping scenario.

papers.title: SkySense-O: Towards Open-World Remote Sensing Interpretation with Vision-Centric Visual-Language Modeling
papers.abstract: Open-world interpretation aims to accurately localize and recognize all objects within images by vision-language models (VLMs). While substantial progress has been made in this task for natural images, the advancements for remote sensing (RS) images still remain limited, primarily due to these two challenges. 1) Existing RS semantic categories are limited, particularly for pixel-level interpretation datasets. 2) Distinguishing among diverse RS spatial regions solely by language space is challenging due to the dense and intricate spatial distribution in open-world RS imagery. To address the first issue, we develop a fine-grained RS interpretation dataset, Sky-SA, which contains 183,375 high-quality local image-text pairs with full-pixel manual annotations, covering 1,763 category labels, exhibiting richer semantics and higher density than previous datasets. Afterwards, to solve the second issue, we introduce the vision-centric principle for vision-language modeling. Specifically, in the pre-training stage, the visual self-supervised paradigm is incorporated into image-text alignment, reducing the degradation of general visual representation capabilities of existing paradigms. Then, we construct a visual-relevance knowledge graph across open-category texts and further develop a novel vision-centric image-text contrastive loss for fine-tuning with text prompts. This new model, denoted as SkySense-O, demonstrates impressive zero-shot capabilities on a thorough evaluation encompassing 14 datasets over 4 tasks, from recognizing to reasoning and classification to localization. Specifically, it outperforms the latest models such as SegEarth-OV, GeoRSCLIP, and VHM by a large margin, i.e., 11.95%, 8.04% and 3.55% on average respectively.

llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文提出将多模态大语言模型（MLLM）转化为通用具身智能体（GEA），通过多体态动作分词器实现跨领域动作输出，并利用监督学习和在线强化学习训练，在具身AI、游戏、UI控制等任务上展现出通用能力，为VLM到VLA的转化提供了重要经验。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 从多模态大语言模型到通用具身智能体：方法与经验
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: MLLM在传统语言视觉任务外，有望扩展到具身智能等领域。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计多体态动作分词器，统一输出动作；使用大规模具身体验监督学习和在线RL。
llm_ranked.result_cn: GEA在多个具身任务中表现优异。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 数据、动作分词和RL是构建通用具身智能体的关键。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to VLM/VLA大模型下多智能体强化学习与时态逻辑研究, especially work that connects or combines: Vision Language Models in multi-agent systems; Vision-Language-Action models for robotics; Multi-agent reinforcement learning with large models; Temporal logic specifications in reinforcement learning; Linear Temporal Logic for multi-agent coordination; Signal Temporal Logic in robotic control; Multi agent reinforcement learning using VLM and temporal logic constraints; VLA models for multi robot coordination with formal specifications; Integrating linear temporal logic with vision language foundation models; Temporal logic guided policy learning in multi agent VLM systems.

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Vision-Language-Action model for robotic manipulation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向机器人操作的视觉-语言-动作模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向机器人操作的视觉-语言-动作模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes object-centric prompt-driven VLA model for robotic manipulation, using multi-modal prompts to convey both low-level actions and high-level planning.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 机器人操作任务中，自然语言存在歧义，图像视频细节过多。本文提出以对象为中心的提示驱动VLA模型，通过简单2D视觉提示（如末端执行器位姿和接触后运动方向）显式表达低级动作和高级规划。训练中将视觉提示与语言图像融合，实现高效的机器人操作学习。实验表明该方法在多个操作任务上显著优于现有方法，提升了指令遵循的准确性和鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 面向机器人操作的对象中心提示驱动视觉-语言-动作模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有方法难以通过单一模态准确传达操作目标的低级动作和高级规划。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出使用2D视觉提示作为显式多模态输入，结合VLA模型进行端到端训练。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个机器人操作 benchmark 上取得领先性能，准确理解并执行复杂指令。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 对象中心的视觉提示有效弥合了语言歧义与精确动作之间的鸿沟。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Vision-Language-Action models for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: SAM model application in remote sensing segmentation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: SAM模型在遥感分割中的应用
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: SAM模型在遥感分割中的应用
llm_ranked.tldr_en: ROS-SAM applies LoRA fine-tuning to SAM for high-quality interactive segmentation of moving objects in remote sensing videos.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 遥感视频中移动目标交互分割面临目标小、特征模糊和泛化难等问题。本文提出ROS-SAM，基于SAM通过三项关键创新实现高质量分割：LoRA微调保持SAM泛化能力；增强网络深层特征判别力；以及针对移动目标的特定处理。实验表明ROS-SAM在多个遥感数据集上实现了高精度交互分割，且保持良好的跨域泛化能力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: ROS-SAM：面向遥感移动目标的高质量交互分割
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 遥感视频中移动目标小而模糊，现有交互分割方法泛化能力有限。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 基于SAM框架，采用LoRA微调并增强深层特征判别力，适配遥感移动目标。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个遥感数据集上取得高精度交互分割结果，且泛化良好。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: LoRA微调SAM可有效提升遥感目标分割的质量与泛化性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: SAM model applications in semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: open-vocabulary segmentation for remote sensing
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 遥感开放词汇分割
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 遥感开放词汇分割
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SegEarth-OV introduces training-free open-vocabulary semantic segmentation for remote sensing with a universal upsampler SimFeatUp.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 遥感图像语义分割常局限于预定义类别，无法识别未见类别。本文首次将训练免开词汇语义分割引入遥感领域，并针对遥感图像低分辨率特征导致的目标形状扭曲和边界不匹配问题，提出简单通用的上采样器SimFeatUp以恢复空间信息。实验表明SegEarth-OV无需额外训练即可实现遥感图像开放词汇分割，在多个数据集上超越了现有方法。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SegEarth-OV：面向遥感图像的无训练开词汇分割
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 遥感分割局限于闭集假设，无法处理实际中大量未见类别。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出基于CLIP的训练免开词汇分割框架，并设计SimFeatUp上采样器恢复细节。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 无需训练即可在遥感图像上实现精确的开放词汇分割。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该工作为遥感应用中的开词汇分割提供了高效灵活的新范式。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: multimodal remote sensing image semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: vision foundation model fine-tuning for semantic segmentation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 视觉基础模型微调用于语义分割
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 视觉基础模型微调用于语义分割
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes symmetrical parameter-efficient fine-tuning in hyperspherical space for CLIP-based open-vocabulary semantic segmentation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 开放词汇语义分割需要将CLIP等视觉语言基础模型适配到像素级预测，但全微调计算量大、模态对齐易受损、泛化能力下降。本文提出在超球空间中进行对称参数高效微调（PEFT），同时优化CLIP的双模态，通过一系列高效模块保持对齐并降低计算开销。实验表明该方法在多个分割基准上显著优于全微调及其他PEFT方法，保持了良好的开放词汇泛化能力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 超球空间中的参数高效微调用于开放词汇语义分割
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: CLIP微调用于分割存在计算成本高、模态对齐破坏和泛化下降问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 在超球空间中进行对称参数高效微调，同时优化视觉和语言模态。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 多个分割数据集上性能优于全微调和现有PEFT方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 超球空间PEFT有效平衡了微调效率与分割性能。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision foundation models for semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: SAM model application for low-quality image segmentation with latent diffusion
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: SAM模型在低质量图像分割中的应用，使用潜在扩散增强
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: SAM模型在低质量图像分割中的应用，使用潜在扩散增强
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes GleSAM, which uses generative latent space enhancement via diffusion to improve SAM segmentation robustness on low-quality images, enabling generalization across image qualities.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: SAM在处理低质量图像时性能严重下降。本文提出GleSAM，通过潜在扩散重建高质量特征表示，提升SAM在低质量图像上的鲁棒性，并引入兼容性技术，使分割模型能泛化到各种图像质量。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 通过生成式潜在空间增强分割任意质量图像
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: SAM在低质量图像上性能显著下降，限制实际应用。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 在SAM潜在空间中执行扩散过程以重建高质量表示，并设计兼容性技术。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多种退化图像上分割精度大幅提升，泛化性强。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 生成式潜在增强可有效提升SAM对低质量图像的鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: SAM model applications in semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: multimodal semantic segmentation method
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 多模态语义分割方法
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 多模态语义分割方法
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes a symmetric parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework for RGB+X semantic segmentation, achieving balanced adaptation across modalities with low cost.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 当前多模态语义分割方法计算成本高且过度依赖RGB模态。本文提出一种对称的参数高效微调框架，通过模态感知提示和自适应机制，同时将预训练模型的能力适配到RGB和X模态。实验表明该方法在多个基准上取得优异分割性能，且大幅减少了可训练参数。为多模态分割提供了一种高效且均衡的新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 保持平衡：用于RGB+X语义分割的参数高效对称框架
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有方法计算成本高且对RGB模态依赖过重，限制了其他模态的潜力。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出对称参数高效微调框架，包含模态感知提示和自适应方案。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个多模态分割数据集上取得优异性能，且参数量大幅降低。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该框架为多模态语义分割提供了一种高效且均衡的解决方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: state of the art multimodal semantic segmentation methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: SAM application in semantic segmentation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: SAM在语义分割中的应用
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: SAM在语义分割中的应用
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces S-Seg, a simple open-vocabulary semantic segmentation model that does not rely on CLIP or SAM, yet achieves strong performance using pseudo-masks.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 开放词汇语义分割通常依赖CLIP和SAM等组件。本文提出S-Seg，仅使用伪掩码和语言训练MaskFormer，无需依赖上述元素。在多个基准上S-Seg表现出与依赖SAM的方法相当甚至更好的性能。这项工作表明简单设计也能取得优异结果，为开放词汇分割提供了新视角。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 探索简单的开放词汇语义分割
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有开放词汇分割方法过度依赖CLIP和SAM等组件，流程复杂。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出S-Seg，利用伪掩码和语言直接训练MaskFormer，无需预训练视觉语言模型。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个数据集上达到与复杂方法相当或更优的分割性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: S-Seg证明简洁的流水线也能实现强大的开放词汇语义分割。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: SAM model applications in semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: VLM for spatio-temporal constraint satisfaction in robotic failure detection
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: VLM用于机器人故障检测中的时空约束满足
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: VLM用于机器人故障检测中的时空约束满足
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes Code-as-Monitor, using VLM-generated code to monitor spatio-temporal constraints for reactive and proactive robotic failure detection.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 机器人系统中同时检测和预防开放性故障具有挑战性。本文提出Code-as-Monitor (CaM)，将故障检测统一为时空约束满足问题，利用VLM生成代码实时评估约束。实验证明CaM在多种机器人场景下有效检测预期和非预期故障，为VLM在机器人安全监控中的应用提供了新范式。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 代码即监控器：用于机器人主动与被动故障检测的约束感知视觉编程
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有方法难以同时实现反应式故障检测和主动预防。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出CaM范式，将故障检测转化为时空约束满足问题，利用VLM生成代码进行实时监控。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多种机器人任务上实现有效的开放集故障检测，优于基线方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: CaM为机器人安全监控提供了VLM驱动的新解决方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Signal Temporal Logic in robotic control

llm_ranked.evidence_en: VLM-based open-vocabulary semantic segmentation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于VLM的开放词汇语义分割
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于VLM的开放词汇语义分割
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes LPOSS, a training-free open-vocabulary semantic segmentation method that enhances VLM patch predictions via label propagation and pixel-level refinement, achieving superior boundary accuracy.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文提出LPOSS，一种无需训练的开放词汇语义分割方法。它利用视觉语言模型（VLM）的初始块级预测，通过标签传播（联合优化块间关系）和像素级细化步骤来提升分割精度。由于VLM的块间相似性不如纯视觉模型，作者引入视觉模型来捕捉更好的相似关系。LPOSS在多个基准上达到先进水平，特别是在边界区域表现优异，为无需训练的分割方法提供了新方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: LPOSS：基于块与像素标签传播的开放词汇语义分割
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有VLM在语义分割中缺乏块间相似性，且受限于块编码器的分辨率
llm_ranked.method_cn: 结合标签传播（块级和像素级）利用视觉模型提升VLM分割预测
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个分割基准上达到先进水平，边界精度显著提高
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 标签传播可以有效增强VLM的开放词汇分割性能，且无需额外训练
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision foundation models for semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: CLIP dense knowledge for weakly supervised semantic segmentation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用CLIP密集知识进行弱监督语义分割
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用CLIP密集知识进行弱监督语义分割
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes ExCEL to explore CLIPs dense patch-text alignment for weakly supervised semantic segmentation, using Text Semantic Enrichment (TSE) and Visual Calibration (VC) to improve CAM generation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文提出ExCEL方法，探索CLIP在弱监督语义分割中的密集知识，通过新颖的块-文本对齐范式代替传统的图像-文本对齐。具体地，文本语义增强（TSE）模块利用大语言模型丰富文本嵌入，视觉校准（VC）模块改善视觉表示。ExCEL在多个基准上显著优于现有方法，证明了CLIP的块级知识在弱监督分割中的巨大潜力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 探索CLIP的密集知识用于弱监督语义分割
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有CLIP-based WSSS方法仅利用图像-文本对齐，忽略了块-文本对齐的潜力
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出块-文本对齐范式，结合TSE和VC模块挖掘CLIP密集知识
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在PASCAL VOC等数据集上达到弱监督语义分割的新先进水平
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: CLIP的块级知识可以显著提升弱监督分割性能，而不仅仅是图像级对齐
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision foundation models for semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: bridges VLM high-level reasoning and low-level manipulation via object-centric primitives
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 通过物体中心原语桥接VLM高层推理与底层操作
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 通过物体中心原语桥接VLM高层推理与底层操作
llm_ranked.tldr_en: OmniManip proposes object-centric interaction primitives to bridge VLM reasoning and precise robotic manipulation, achieving generalizable manipulation without costly VLA fine-tuning.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对视觉语言模型（VLM）缺乏精细3D空间理解而微调为视觉语言动作模型（VLA）成本高昂的问题，本文提出OmniManip，通过物体中心交互原语将VLM的高层常识推理与机器人精确操作相结合。该方法无需大量机器人数据集微调，即可在多种操作任务中实现高泛化性，为通用机器人操作提供了高效新途径。
llm_ranked.title_zh: OmniManip：通过物体中心交互原语实现通用机器人操作
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: VLM擅长高层推理但缺乏3D空间精度，VLA微调数据采集成本高且泛化差。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出物体中心交互原语，将物体规范空间作为空间约束，连接VLM推理与底层控制。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个操作任务上达到SOTA，无需大量机器人数据即可泛化到新场景。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 物体中心原语有效弥合了VLM与精细操作之间的鸿沟，为通用机器人提供了可扩展方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Vision-Language-Action models for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: transfers VLA models from fixed-base to mobile manipulation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 将VLA模型从固定基座迁移到移动操作
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 将VLA模型从固定基座迁移到移动操作
llm_ranked.tldr_en: MoManipVLA efficiently transfers pre-trained VLA models for fixed-base manipulation to mobile manipulation, achieving generalization across tasks and environments.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对移动操作缺乏大规模训练数据导致泛化困难的问题，本文提出MoManipVLA策略适应框架，将预训练的固定基座视觉语言动作（VLA）模型高效迁移至移动操作场景。该方法在多种任务与环境中展现出强泛化能力，为移动机器人通用操作提供了可扩展的解决方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: MoManipVLA：迁移视觉语言动作模型实现通用移动操作
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 移动操作数据获取困难，现有VLA模型仅适用于固定基座，亟需迁移方法。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出高效策略适应框架，通过微调少量参数将固定基座VLA迁移到移动操作。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多种移动操作任务上达到SOTA泛化性能，跨环境迁移成功率超过90%。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: VLA模型迁移是解决移动操作数据稀缺的有效途径，推动了通用机器人发展。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Vision-Language-Action models for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: remote sensing semantic segmentation using VLM
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 遥感图像语义分割结合视觉语言模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 遥感图像语义分割结合视觉语言模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes SkySense-O for open-world remote sensing interpretation using vision-centric VLM, addressing limited categories and dense spatial distribution.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有遥感语义分割面临类别有限和空间分布密集的挑战。本文提出SkySense-O，采用以视觉为中心的视觉语言建模，构建细粒度数据集Sky-SA，实现了开放世界遥感图像中所有物体的定位与识别，显著提升了分割精度和泛化能力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SkySense-O：面向开放世界遥感解译的以视觉为中心的视觉语言建模
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有遥感语义分割类别有限且空间分布密集，难以区分多样区域。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建细粒度遥感数据集Sky-SA，并采用以视觉为中心的视觉语言模型进行开放世界分割。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个遥感数据集上取得优异分割性能，尤其对细粒度类别表现突出。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 视觉中心方法能有效提升遥感开放世界分割的准确性和泛化性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: multimodal remote sensing image semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: multimodal sensor fusion for autonomous driving perception
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 自动驾驶中的多模态传感器融合感知
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 自动驾驶中的多模态传感器融合感知
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes MoME, a mixture-of-experts detector for robust LiDAR-camera fusion under sensor failures like beam reduction or drop.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 自动驾驶多模态融合在传感器故障时性能骤降。本文提出MoME，利用混合专家架构解耦模态依赖，通过并行专家解码器应对LiDAR衰减、相机遮挡等故障，在nuScenes数据集上显著提升鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 基于多模态专家融合的传感器失效下鲁棒融合方法
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有传感器融合在LiDAR或相机失效时性能严重下降。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计三个并行专家解码器分别处理不同模态，通过门控机制融合输出。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多种传感器失效场景下均保持高检测精度。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: MoME有效提升了自动驾驶感知系统在异常条件下的可靠性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: multimodal perception and segmentation for autonomous driving

llm_ranked.evidence_en: adapts SAM for amodal instance segmentation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 将SAM应用于amodal实例分割
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 将SAM应用于amodal实例分割
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes SAMEO, adapting Segment Anything Model as a flexible mask decoder for amodal instance segmentation, handling occlusion with various front-end detectors.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有amodal分割需要联合训练检测器和分割网络，缺乏灵活性。本文提出SAMEO，将Segment Anything Model（SAM）改造为通用掩码解码器，与多种前端检测器配合实现遮挡物体分割，并构建大规模数据集Amodal-LVIS，显著提升遮挡场景下的分割性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 分割一切，包括遮挡
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有amodal实例分割方法缺乏灵活性，无法利用预训练检测器。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 将SAM作为掩码解码器，与前端检测器解耦，通过提示调整适应遮挡。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在COCO及Amodal-LVIS数据集上，遮挡物体分割性能大幅提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: SAMEO为amodal分割提供了灵活高效的框架。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: SAM model applications in semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: SAM model upgraded to video segmentation with minimal training cost
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: SAM模型升级到视频分割，极低训练成本
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: SAM模型升级到视频分割，极低训练成本
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SAM-I2V upgrades SAM for promptable video segmentation with less than 0.2% training cost, achieving temporally consistent mask propagation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对视频分割中SAM 2从零训练成本过高的问题，本文提出SAM-I2V图像到视频升级方法，基于预训练SAM进行高效迁移，以低于0.2%的训练成本实现可提示视频分割，确保动态场景中精确且时空一致的掩膜传播。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SAM-I2V: 以低于0.2%训练成本升级SAM实现可提示视频分割
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: SAM 2从零训练视频分割模型成本过高。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SAM-I2V图像到视频升级方法，基于预训练SAM进行高效迁移。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 以极低训练成本实现可提示视频分割。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为SAM在视频分割中的实用部署提供高效方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: SAM model applications in semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Vision foundation models fine-tuned for domain generalized semantic segmentation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 视觉基础模型用于域泛化语义分割的鲁棒调优
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 视觉基础模型用于域泛化语义分割的鲁棒调优
llm_ranked.tldr_en: FisherTune uses Domain-Related Fisher Information Matrix to guide robust fine-tuning of VFMs for domain generalized semantic segmentation, maintaining generalization.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对视觉基础模型微调后泛化能力下降的问题，本文提出FisherTune方法，利用域相关Fisher信息矩阵度量参数在各任务和域上的敏感性，指导选择性调优，在域泛化语义分割任务中既充分利用VFM潜力又保持泛化能力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: FisherTune: 基于Fisher引导的视觉基础模型鲁棒调优用于域泛化分割
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 微调视觉基础模型进行域泛化语义分割时保持泛化能力困难。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出FisherTune，利用域相关Fisher信息矩阵指导参数调优。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在域泛化分割任务上有效。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 实现对VFM的鲁棒微调，适用于域泛化语义分割。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision foundation models for semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Collaborative BEV semantic segmentation for autonomous driving
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 协作BEV语义分割用于自动驾驶
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 协作BEV语义分割用于自动驾驶
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes CoGMP, a collaborative framework using generative map priors for efficient compression and robust fusion in BEV semantic segmentation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对现有协作感知方法不适合密集特征的BEV语义分割问题，提出CoGMP框架，引入生成地图先验实现高效压缩（EFFC）和鲁棒融合（SGFF）。在多个数据集上实验表明，该方法在压缩率和分割精度上均优于现有方法，推动了协作感知在密集预测任务中的应用。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 生成地图先验用于协作BEV语义分割
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有协作感知方法面向稀疏目标检测，不适合密集BEV语义分割。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出CoGMP，利用生成地图先验实现元素格式压缩和结构引导融合。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实现高效压缩并保持高精度语义分割。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 生成先验有效解决协作BEV分割中的压缩与融合挑战。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: multimodal perception and segmentation for autonomous driving

llm_ranked.evidence_en: SAM combined with CLIP for open-vocabulary semantic segmentation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: SAM与CLIP结合用于开放词汇语义分割
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: SAM与CLIP结合用于开放词汇语义分割
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes ESC-Net, a one-stage open-vocabulary segmentation model leveraging SAM decoder blocks and pseudo prompts from image-text correlations.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有开放词汇语义分割两阶段方法（SAM+CLIP）计算和内存效率低。本文提出ESC-Net，利用SAM解码器作为类无关分割模块，并通过图像-文本相关性生成伪提示嵌入到SAM框架中，实现单阶段高效推理。实验表明该方法在多个基准上取得优异分割精度且推理更快。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 高效SAM组合用于开放词汇语义分割
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 两阶段SAM+CLIP方法计算和内存效率低下。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出ESC-Net，单阶段集成SAM解码器与伪提示嵌入。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个开放词汇分割基准上实现高效高精度。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 单阶段SAM融合可有效提升开放词汇分割效率。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: SAM model applications in semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: VLM-based generalized reward for physical skill learning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于VLM的通用奖励函数用于物理技能学习
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于VLM的通用奖励函数用于物理技能学习
llm_ranked.tldr_en: GROVE uses LLMs and VLMs to automatically generate reward functions for open-vocabulary physical skill learning, eliminating manual engineering and demonstration dependence.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 强化学习在开放词汇物理技能学习中面临奖励设计耗时、示范泛化差的问题。GROVE提出利用大语言模型生成精确物理约束、视觉语言模型评估运动语义和自然性，自动构建通用奖励函数。实验证明该方法无需手工设计或示范即可学习多样化技能，显著提升泛化能力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: GROVE：一种用于学习开放词汇物理技能的通用奖励框架
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有强化学习奖励设计依赖手工或示范，难以扩展到开放词汇物理技能学习任务。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 利用LLM和VLM的互补优势，LLM生成物理约束，VLM评估运动语义，自动构建通用奖励函数。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 无需手动工程或任务特定示范即可有效学习多样物理技能，泛化性能显著提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: GROVE框架为开放词汇物理技能学习提供了可扩展的奖励自动生成方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Vision-Language-Action models for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: LVLM for part-level semantic co-segmentation across images
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用大视觉语言模型实现跨图像的部件级语义共分割
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用大视觉语言模型实现跨图像的部件级语义共分割
llm_ranked.tldr_en: CALICO introduces part-focused semantic co-segmentation and proposes the first LVLM that jointly segments common objects and their parts across multiple images.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有LVLM难以处理跨图像的细粒度部件级分割推理。CALICO定义了部件聚焦语义共分割新任务，并首次提出能同时分割多图像中共享物体及其共有和独特部件的LVLM。通过新颖的对应提取模块实现跨图像特征对齐，在多个基准上展示了细粒度分割能力的突破。
llm_ranked.title_zh: CALICO：基于大视觉语言模型的部件聚焦语义共分割
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: LVLM在单图像文本驱动分割上表现出色，但跨图像的部件级分割推理能力不足。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出CALICO，首个专为多图像部件级推理分割设计的LVLM，包含对应提取模块实现跨图像特征对齐。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多图像部件级分割任务上取得领先性能，验证了细粒度语义推理能力。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: CALICO推动了LVLM在细粒度跨图像分割中的应用边界。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to 多模态语义分割最新热点，涵盖自动驾驶、遥感及SAM大模型应用, especially work that connects or combines: latest trends in multimodal semantic segmentation; SAM model applications in semantic segmentation; multimodal perception and segmentation for autonomous driving; multimodal remote sensing image semantic segmentation; vision foundation models for semantic segmentation; state of the art multimodal semantic segmentation methods; Segment Anything Model fine tuning for specific domains; multimodal fusion strategies for autonomous vehicle perception; advancements in remote sensing image segmentation using large models.

llm_ranked.evidence_en: SAM-based foundation model for zero-shot amodal segmentation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于SAM的零样本amodal分割基础模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于SAM的零样本amodal分割基础模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SAMBA adapts SAM for zero-shot amodal segmentation by introducing multilevel facilitation and a separation-to-fusion structure, achieving efficiency and stability.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 零样本amodal分割要求预测被遮挡物体的完整形状，现有模型效率与稳定性不足。SAMBA利用SAM的隐含先验知识，提出多级促进框架和分离-融合结构，联合学习模态与模态外特征。实验表明其在多个基准上实现高效且稳定的零样本amodal分割，拓展了SAM在开放世界中的应用。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 面向高效零样本amodal分割的基础模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 零样本amodal分割需要高效稳定的基础模型，现有SAM适配方案存在效率低和稳定性差的问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 基于SAM设计多级促进框架，采用分离-融合结构联合学习模态与模态外特征。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个amodal分割数据集上实现领先的零样本性能，且推理速度快、结果稳定。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: SAMBA有效发掘SAM在amodal分割任务中的潜力，推动了基础模型在开放世界分割中的应用。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: SAM model applications in semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: open-vocabulary semantic segmentation using CLIP guidance
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于CLIP引导的开放词汇语义分割
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于CLIP引导的开放词汇语义分割
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes dual semantic guidance from images and texts for open-vocabulary semantic segmentation, addressing bias in pure text guidance.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文针对开放词汇语义分割中仅依靠文本引导的偏差，提出从图像和文本双向捕获语义信息的双语义引导方法，在多个基准上取得最优性能，有效提升了CLIP模型在像素级识别上的微调效果。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 开放词汇语义分割的双语义引导
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有方法仅利用文本引导存在语义偏差，且缺乏像素级监督信息。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 同时利用图像和文本中的语义信息构造双语义引导，对CLIP模型进行微调。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个开放词汇分割数据集上达到新高度。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 双语义引导能有效提升CLIP在像素级任务上的表现。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision foundation models for semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: enhancing SAM with image-prompt synergy for detail
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 通过图像-提示协同增强SAM细节提取
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 通过图像-提示协同增强SAM细节提取
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces SAM-REF, an enhancement to SAM that improves detail extraction by synergizing image and prompt features during interaction.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文针对Segment Anything Model（SAM）在交互式分割中细节提取能力不足的问题，提出SAM-REF，在交互过程中引入图像-提示协同机制，在不增加额外延迟的前提下显著提升分割细节质量，为SAM的进一步应用提供了改进方向。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SAM-REF：交互过程中引入图像-提示协同以增强Segment Anything Model细节
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: SAM在延迟交互策略中细节提取能力受限。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计图像-提示协同模块，在每次交互中融合图像和提示特征。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个基准上分割细节得到显著提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 图像-提示协同是提升SAM细节的有效途径。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: SAM model applications in semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: multimodal anomaly segmentation dataset for autonomous driving
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 自动驾驶多模态异常分割数据集
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 自动驾驶多模态异常分割数据集
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Presents STU, the first 3D LiDAR dataset for anomaly segmentation in autonomous driving with dense semantic labels and multimodal data.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 自动驾驶中异常检测对安全至关重要。本文提出STU数据集，首个面向道路异常分割的3D LiDAR数据集，包含LiDAR和相机数据，并提供密集3D语义标注。数据集支持多种范围下的异常检测，为自动驾驶感知研究提供了宝贵资源。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 发现意外（STU）：用于自动驾驶异常分割的3D LiDAR数据集
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有3D数据集缺乏高质量多模态异常分割标注。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建包含LiDAR和相机数据的道路异常分割数据集，提供密集3D语义标签。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 数据集涵盖多种异常场景，为3D异常分割提供了标准基准。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: STU数据集推动了自动驾驶中3D异常感知的研究。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: multimodal perception and segmentation for autonomous driving

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Multimodal large language model for autonomous driving perception and planning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 用于自动驾驶感知与规划的多模态大语言模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 用于自动驾驶感知与规划的多模态大语言模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes S4-Driver, a self-supervised driving MLLM with spatio-temporal visual representation that learns in 3D space rather than 2D, enabling better planning without human annotations.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文提出S4-Driver，一个可扩展的自监督驾驶多模态大语言模型（MLLM）。它针对现有MLLM在2D图像空间预训练导致3D规划不足的问题，引入时空视觉表示，直接在3D空间学习。S4-Driver无需人类标注即可从传感器输入生成规划轨迹，在nuScenes等数据集上达到与有监督方法相当的性能，为端到端自动驾驶的纯自监督学习提供了新的突破。
llm_ranked.title_zh: S4-Driver：基于时空视觉表示的可扩展自监督驾驶多模态大语言模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有基于MLLM的端到端自动驾驶方法依赖2D预训练，缺乏3D规划能力
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出S4-Driver，通过时空视觉表示在3D空间进行自监督学习，无需人类标注
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在自动驾驶基准上实现与有监督方法媲美的规划性能
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 直接在3D空间自监督预训练可以弥合感知与规划的表示鸿沟
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: multimodal perception and segmentation for autonomous driving

llm_ranked.evidence_en: VLM for robotic physical reachability understanding
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: VLM理解机器人物理可达性
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: VLM理解机器人物理可达性
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes PhysVLM, a VLM that integrates a Space-Physical Reachability Map (S-P Map) to understand robotic reachability, enabling accurate embodied visual reasoning across diverse robots.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文提出PhysVLM，针对VLM在具身视觉推理中因缺乏物理可达性理解而产生不准确响应的问题，构建了统一的空间-物理可达性图（S-P Map）并集成到VLM中。S-P Map将不同机器人的物理可达性抽象为通用空间表示，从而使VLM能够生成更实际的操作建议。实验表明PhysVLM在多个机器人平台上显著提升了任务成功率，为VLM在机器人领域的应用提供了物理感知新维度。

llm_ranked.method_cn: 在蒙特卡洛树中引导多智能体讨论长期计划，使用LLM驱动的奖励函数指导搜索。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个协作任务上成功率提高20%以上，执行效率显著提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 协作树搜索有效促进了多智能体间的协调规划，是大模型应用于多智能体系统的重要进展。

llm_ranked.result_cn: 在异构协作感知任务中实现高精度和强可扩展性。

llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用GFlowNets微调VLM以增强多步推理，连接VLM与强化学习
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用GFlowNets微调VLM以增强多步推理，连接VLM与强化学习
llm_ranked.tldr_en: GFlowVLM uses Generative Flow Networks to fine-tune VLMs for diverse multi-step reasoning, overcoming limitations of SFT and PPO in reward optimization.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: VLM在多步推理任务中微调存在SFT对独立同分布假设的依赖和PPO对累积奖励最大化的限制，导致解多样性不足。GFlowVLM引入生成流网络，通过鼓励探索多种合理推理路径来提升泛化能力。实验表明其在不同推理任务上优于SFT和PPO，产生更丰富的解。

llm_ranked.method_cn: 采用生成流网络（GFlowNets）作为微调框架，以促进多步推理中多样化解的生成。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多步推理基准上相比SFT和PPO获得更优性能，且解多样性显著增加。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: GFlowNet为VLM推理微调提供了一种高效多样化的替代方案。

llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 视觉指令为机器人与人交互提供了更精确、直观的方式。

llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于多模态大语言模型的机器人动作修正自反思框架
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于多模态大语言模型的机器人动作修正自反思框架

llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出双过程运动调整机制，利用MLLM将语义反思转化为粗粒度运动指令调整，再进一步细化。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验表明框架能有效纠正机器人动作错误，提升任务成功率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 运动指令是连接语义和低层动作的有效桥梁。

llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 双曲空间中微调CLIP以进行语义分割

llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 动态查询融合是实现跨任务可扩展分割的有效途径，为视觉基础模型的应用提供了新范式。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: VLM-empowered end-to-end planning for autonomous driving
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: VLM赋能端到端自动驾驶规划
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: VLM赋能端到端自动驾驶规划
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes SOLVE, synergizing VLMs with end-to-end models via shared encoder and trajectory chain-of-thought for autonomous driving planning.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对VLM集成到自动驾驶中的计算效率问题，提出SOLVE框架，通过共享视觉编码器实现VLM与端到端模型在特征级知识共享，并设计轨迹思维链（T-CoT）逐步优化轨迹预测。实验表明该方法在规划准确性和实时性上取得平衡，展示了VLM在自主驾驶规划中的实际应用价值。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SOLVE：语言-视觉与端到端网络的协同自动驾驶
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: VLM集成到自动驾驶面临计算开销和实时性挑战。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SOLVE，通过共享编码器和轨迹思维链融合VLM与端到端规划。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在规划准确性和实时性上均优于基线。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: VLM与端到端协同可提升自动驾驶规划能力。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Vision-Language-Action models for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Distilling multimodal LLM knowledge to vision-based planner for autonomous driving
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 将多模态大模型知识蒸馏到基于视觉的自动驾驶规划器
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 将多模态大模型知识蒸馏到基于视觉的自动驾驶规划器
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Distills information from a multimodal LLM to a vision-based end-to-end planner using surrogate tasks for efficient autonomous driving.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 大语言模型作为规划器计算成本高，本文提出DiMA，通过设计代理任务将多模态LLM的世界知识蒸馏到纯视觉端到端规划器中，实现无LLM推理的高效规划。联合训练使场景编码器学习结构化表示，在长尾场景下保持了LLM的泛化能力且推理更快。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 为自动驾驶蒸馏多模态大语言模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 使用LLM做规划器测试时计算代价高。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 通过代理任务将多模态LLM知识蒸馏到视觉端到端规划器。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在保持泛化能力的同时显著降低推理成本。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 知识蒸馏可实现高效且鲁棒的自动驾驶规划。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Vision-Language-Action models for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Actor-Critic framework for VLM reasoning refinement
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于Actor-Critic的VLM推理纠错框架
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于Actor-Critic的VLM推理纠错框架
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Critic-V decouples reasoning and critique in VLMs using an actor-critic framework, where a Reasoner generates responses and a Critic provides constructive feedback to refine them.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: VLM在多模态推理中常出现幻觉或推理路径错误。Critic-V借鉴Actor-Critic范式，将推理与批评解耦：推理器生成初始回答，批判器提供建设性批评以迭代优化。该框架无需额外训练数据即可显著提升VLM推理准确性，并减少错误累积。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Critic-V：VLM批评者帮助捕捉视觉语言模型在多模态推理中的错误
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: VLM在多模态推理中产生不准确或无关响应，需要一种自动纠错机制。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 解耦推理与批评过程，集成独立推理器和批判器，批判器提供建设性反馈以迭代细化推理路径。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 多模态推理基准上准确率显著提升，有效减少幻觉和推理错误。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: Actor-Critic范式可有效增强VLM推理的鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to VLM/VLA大模型下多智能体强化学习与时态逻辑研究, especially work that connects or combines: Vision Language Models in multi-agent systems; Vision-Language-Action models for robotics; Multi-agent reinforcement learning with large models; Temporal logic specifications in reinforcement learning; Linear Temporal Logic for multi-agent coordination; Signal Temporal Logic in robotic control; Multi agent reinforcement learning using VLM and temporal logic constraints; VLA models for multi robot coordination with formal specifications; Integrating linear temporal logic with vision language foundation models; Temporal logic guided policy learning in multi agent VLM systems.

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Generalizable 3D-language feature fields for embodied tasks
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 用于具身任务的通用3D语言特征场
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 用于具身任务的通用3D语言特征场
llm_ranked.tldr_en: g3D-LF pre-trains 3D-language feature fields from posed RGB-D images, enabling real-time construction and language querying for embodied agents.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有具身任务中的3D表示缺乏语言交互能力，且难以泛化。本文提出g3D-LF，一种在大规模3D语言数据集上预训练的通用3D语言特征场模型，能够处理智能体输入的RGB-D图像，编码包含语义和空间关系的特征场，支持新视角预测、BEV地图生成和多粒度语言查询。该表示可泛化到未见环境，实现实时构建和动态更新。实验表明，g3D-LF在多种具身理解任务上取得优异性能，为语言引导的3D感知提供了强大基础。
llm_ranked.title_zh: g3D-LF：用于具身任务的通用3D语言特征场
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有方法缺乏可泛化的3D语言特征表示，难以支持智能体进行实时场景理解与语言交互。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出g3D-LF，利用体积渲染和多尺度编码器从RGB-D图像中学习语义与空间融合的3D语言特征场。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个具身任务上取得领先性能，且能实时构建和动态更新。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: g3D-LF为语言引导的3D感知提供了高效可泛化的解决方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to VLM/VLA大模型下多智能体强化学习与时态逻辑研究, especially work that connects or combines: Vision Language Models in multi-agent systems; Vision-Language-Action models for robotics; Multi-agent reinforcement learning with large models; Temporal logic specifications in reinforcement learning; Linear Temporal Logic for multi-agent coordination; Signal Temporal Logic in robotic control; Multi agent reinforcement learning using VLM and temporal logic constraints; VLA models for multi robot coordination with formal specifications; Integrating linear temporal logic with vision language foundation models; Temporal logic guided policy learning in multi agent VLM systems.

llm_ranked.evidence_en: VLM dataset for autonomous driving with counterfactual reasoning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 用于自驾的VLM数据集及反事实推理
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 用于自驾的VLM数据集及反事实推理
llm_ranked.tldr_en: OmniDrive provides a holistic VLM dataset with counterfactual reasoning to align 3D driving tasks with VLM reasoning.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 自动驾驶中VLM的3D理解能力不足。本文提出OmniDrive，一个全面的VLM数据集，通过反事实推理增强3D驾驶任务对齐。该数据集利用反事实合成数据标注，生成大规模高质量数据，为规划提供密集监督信号。实验表明，基于该数据集训练的模型在3D驾驶场景推理和规划任务上表现显著提升。该工作推动了VLM在自动驾驶决策中的应用。
llm_ranked.title_zh: OmniDrive：面向自动驾驶的全面视觉语言数据集与反事实推理
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: VLM在自动驾驶中的3D理解能力有限，缺乏高质量3D对齐数据集。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建大规模反事实合成数据，通过反事实推理对齐VLM与3D驾驶任务。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 训练的模型在3D驾驶推理和规划任务上取得显著提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 反事实推理为VLM的3D驾驶决策提供了有效监督信号。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to VLM/VLA大模型下多智能体强化学习与时态逻辑研究, especially work that connects or combines: Vision Language Models in multi-agent systems; Vision-Language-Action models for robotics; Multi-agent reinforcement learning with large models; Temporal logic specifications in reinforcement learning; Linear Temporal Logic for multi-agent coordination; Signal Temporal Logic in robotic control; Multi agent reinforcement learning using VLM and temporal logic constraints; VLA models for multi robot coordination with formal specifications; Integrating linear temporal logic with vision language foundation models; Temporal logic guided policy learning in multi agent VLM systems.

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Semantic occupancy mapping for autonomous driving using evidence theory
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于证据理论的自动驾驶语义占据映射
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于证据理论的自动驾驶语义占据映射
llm_ranked.tldr_en: EvOcc framework uses evidence theory for accurate 3D semantic occupancy mapping from noisy LiDAR and trains image-based models with new loss, improving mIoU by 15.8% for GT and 5.5% for trained model.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对自动驾驶语义占据映射中未观测空间和矛盾测量的不确定性问题，本文提出EvOcc框架，包含基于证据理论计算高精度语义占据地图真值的方法，以及通过新损失函数训练图像占据估计模型的方法，在射线mIoU指标上分别提升15.8%和5.5%。
llm_ranked.title_zh: EvOcc: 基于证据理论的自动驾驶精确语义占据估计
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语义占据地图未显式建模未观测空间或矛盾测量的不确定性。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出EvOcc框架，包括证据理论真值计算和新损失函数的图像占据模型训练。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在射线mIoU指标上，真值改进至少15.8%，训练模型改进5.5%。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 显式建模不确定性得到更强模型，用于自动驾驶感知。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to 多模态语义分割最新热点，涵盖自动驾驶、遥感及SAM大模型应用, especially work that connects or combines: latest trends in multimodal semantic segmentation; SAM model applications in semantic segmentation; multimodal perception and segmentation for autonomous driving; multimodal remote sensing image semantic segmentation; vision foundation models for semantic segmentation; state of the art multimodal semantic segmentation methods; Segment Anything Model fine tuning for specific domains; multimodal fusion strategies for autonomous vehicle perception; advancements in remote sensing image segmentation using large models.

llm_ranked.evidence_en: parameter-efficient transfer for video-language foundation models
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 视频语言基础模型的参数高效迁移
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 视频语言基础模型的参数高效迁移
llm_ranked.tldr_en: MSTA adapter enables parameter-efficient transfer of video-language models with spatio-temporal alignment.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 视频语言基础模型迁移时引入额外模块易导致遗忘。MSTA提出多模态时空适配器，仅用少量参数对齐文本与视觉表示，平衡通用知识与任务特定学习。在视频动作识别任务上验证了高效性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 视频语言基础模型的高效迁移学习
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有迁移方法引入大量参数且易遗忘通用知识。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计参数高效的多模态时空适配器（MSTA）。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在视频动作识别中以极少参数达到高迁移性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 轻量适配器可有效缓解灾难性遗忘并保持泛化性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision foundation models for semantic segmentation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: VLM-guided distillation for vision-based RL, related to VLA
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: VLM引导蒸馏用于视觉强化学习，与VLA模型相关
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: VLM引导蒸馏用于视觉强化学习，与VLA模型相关
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Uses VLMs to distill guidance into a compact vision-based RL agent, improving sample efficiency and semantic constraints.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对视觉强化学习中数据样本有限和缺乏语义约束的问题，提出DGC方法，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）的指导进行表示蒸馏，结合自监督学习，将VLM知识压缩到紧凑的VRL智能体中。在多个基准任务上验证了该方法能有效提升样本效率和策略性能，为VLM在机器人RL中的应用提供了轻量化方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: VLM引导的表示蒸馏用于高效视觉强化学习
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 解决视觉强化学习中数据有限和缺乏语义约束的问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出DGC，从VLM蒸馏指导信号结合自监督学习到紧凑VRL智能体。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个视觉RL任务上提升了样本效率和策略性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: VLM引导的蒸馏可有效增强视觉RL表示质量。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Vision-Language-Action models for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: uses formal verification techniques analogous to temporal logic
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 使用类似于时态逻辑的形式化验证技术
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 使用类似于时态逻辑的形式化验证技术
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes NeuS-V, a neuro-symbolic evaluation metric using formal verification to assess text-to-video temporal alignment.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有视频生成评估忽略时间保真度。本文提出NeuS-V，利用神经符号形式化验证技术将提示转换为时序规范，严格评估文本-视频对齐精度，为安全关键应用提供可靠度量。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 基于形式化验证的文本到视频模型神经符号评估
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有视频评估指标忽视时间对齐，不适用于安全关键应用。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 将提示转换为形式化规范，使用神经符号方法验证文本与视频的时间对齐。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个视频生成模型上验证了该指标与人类判断的一致性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: NeuS-V为评估视频时间保真度提供了形式化工具。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Temporal logic specifications in reinforcement learning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Causally-aware interaction representations for multi-agent systems
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 多智能体系统的因果感知交互表征
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 多智能体系统的因果感知交互表征
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Investigates causal awareness of multi-agent interaction representations via metric learning, showing resilience to non-causal perturbations but challenges in modeling mediator effects.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对多智能体交互表征的因果意识评估问题，本文从计算形式化到实际应用深入分析现有表征，通过度量学习发现这些表征对非因果代理扰动已有部分韧性，但间接因果效应（中介代理）的建模仍具挑战，为多智能体强化学习和模拟到真实迁移提供因果感知基础。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Sim-to-Real因果迁移：度量学习实现因果感知交互表征
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现代表征能否捕捉智能体交互中的因果关系尚不清楚。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 采用度量学习来评估和学习因果感知的交互表征。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 显示现有表征对非因果扰动已有部分韧性，但中介效应建模仍有挑战。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为多智能体交互的因果建模和模拟到真实迁移提供新视角。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Multi-agent reinforcement learning with large models

llm_ranked.evidence_en: interactive segmentation using diffusion attention
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用扩散注意力进行交互式分割
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用扩散注意力进行交互式分割
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes training-free unsupervised interactive segmentation using Stable Diffusion self-attention, interpreting attention as Markov chains to generate segmentation maps.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文提出一种无需训练的无监督交互式分割方法，利用Stable Diffusion的自注意力机制，将其解释为马尔可夫转移算子，通过迭代计数得到分割图。该方法避免了传统方法对标注数据的依赖，为交互式分割提供了新的思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 重新利用稳定扩散注意力实现免训练无监督交互式分割
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有无监督交互式分割依赖自监督预训练模型生成伪标签，本文探索直接利用预训练扩散模型的自注意力进行分割。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 将Stable Diffusion的自注意力张量解释为马尔可夫转移算子，通过迭代马尔可夫链计算像素达到概率阈值的步数，生成马尔可夫迭代图。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个数据集上验证了该方法无需训练即可实现有效的交互式分割。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 表明扩散模型的自注意力可被重新用于交互式分割任务，无需额外训练。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to 多模态语义分割最新热点，涵盖自动驾驶、遥感及SAM大模型应用, especially work that connects or combines: latest trends in multimodal semantic segmentation; SAM model applications in semantic segmentation; multimodal perception and segmentation for autonomous driving; multimodal remote sensing image semantic segmentation; vision foundation models for semantic segmentation; state of the art multimodal semantic segmentation methods; Segment Anything Model fine tuning for specific domains; multimodal fusion strategies for autonomous vehicle perception; advancements in remote sensing image segmentation using large models.

llm_ranked.evidence_en: state-of-the-art 3D semantic segmentation with boundary feature analysis
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 先进的3D语义分割方法，关注边界特征分析
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 先进的3D语义分割方法，关注边界特征分析
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Revisits 3D semantic segmentation by categorizing errors into four types and proposing boundary-focused metrics and methods to improve performance on challenging regions.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 当前3D语义分割方法只关注整体指标，忽略了边界等困难区域。本文提出错误分类框架和对应评估指标，并设计边界特征分析网络，在多个数据集上显著提升边界分割质量。
llm_ranked.title_zh: BFANet：通过边界特征分析重新审视3D语义分割
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有3D语义分割方法忽视边界等挑战区域，整体指标掩盖了细分问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 划分四类分割错误，构建边界特征分析网络。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在S3DIS等数据集上边界区域mIoU提升明显。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 细粒度错误分析和边界特征学习有助于提升分割精细度。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: state of the art multimodal semantic segmentation methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: VLM-powered agent for autonomous driving perception restoration
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: VLM驱动的自动驾驶感知恢复智能体
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: VLM驱动的自动驾驶感知恢复智能体
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes JarvisIR, a VLM-powered agent that uses Llava-Llama3 as a controller to manage expert restoration models for robust autonomous driving perception in adverse weather.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 自动驾驶视觉感知在恶劣天气下退化严重。本文提出JarvisIR，以VLM(如Llava-Llama3)作为控制器，协同多个专家恢复模型，并通过微调和人类反馈对齐提升鲁棒性，实现无退化先验的通用图像恢复。
llm_ranked.title_zh: JarvisIR：利用智能图像恢复提升自动驾驶感知
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有恢复方法依赖特定先验或存在域差距，难以应对复杂天气退化。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 以VLM为控制器管理多个恢复专家，结合微调与人类反馈对齐。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多种恶劣天气恢复和下游感知任务上取得最佳效果。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: VLM作为控制器可有效集成多种恢复专家，提升自动驾驶鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: multimodal perception and segmentation for autonomous driving

llm_ranked.evidence_en: extends 2D vision models to 4D for open-vocabulary segmentation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 将2D视觉模型扩展到4D，支持开放词汇分割
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 将2D视觉模型扩展到4D，支持开放词汇分割
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Feature4X extends 2D vision foundation models to 4D using Gaussian feature fields, enabling open-vocabulary segmentation and language-guided editing from monocular video.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对3D/4D场景中视觉语言任务缺乏大规模标注数据的问题，本文提出Feature4X框架，利用高斯特征场将2D视觉基础模型功能扩展到4D领域，仅需单目视频即可实现开放词汇分割、语言引导编辑等操作。该方法大幅降低了对多视图数据的需求，为4D场景理解提供了通用解决方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Feature4X：将任意单目视频桥接至4D智能体AI
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 3D/4D场景缺乏大规模标注数据，限制视觉语言任务泛化，亟需从2D模型高效迁移的方法。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建高斯特征场，从单目视频中学习4D表示，将2D基础模型能力扩展到4D。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在开放词汇分割和语言引导编辑任务上达到先进水平，无需多视图数据。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 高斯特征场是连接2D与4D视觉语言能力的有效桥梁，推动了智能体AI的发展。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to 多模态语义分割最新热点，涵盖自动驾驶、遥感及SAM大模型应用, especially work that connects or combines: latest trends in multimodal semantic segmentation; SAM model applications in semantic segmentation; multimodal perception and segmentation for autonomous driving; multimodal remote sensing image semantic segmentation; vision foundation models for semantic segmentation; state of the art multimodal semantic segmentation methods; Segment Anything Model fine tuning for specific domains; multimodal fusion strategies for autonomous vehicle perception; advancements in remote sensing image segmentation using large models.

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Discriminative fine-tuning of LVLMs for strong compositional reasoning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 大型视觉语言模型的判别性微调方法
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 大型视觉语言模型的判别性微调方法
llm_ranked.tldr_en: VladVA converts generative LVLMs into discriminative models via novel training, combining detailed reasoning with discriminative capabilities for vision-language tasks.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对生成式LVLM不适合判别任务而对比式VLM语言理解有限的问题，本文提出将生成式LVLM转换为判别式模型的微调方法，保留详细推理能力的同时获得强判别性和组合能力，为VLM在多种应用中的使用提供新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: VladVA: 大型视觉语言模型的判别性微调
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 生成式LVLM不适合判别任务，而对比式VLM语言理解有限。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出将生成式LVLM转换为判别式模型的微调方法，结合两者优势。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 获得强判别性和组合能力。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 实现判别式LVLM的有效微调，可应用于VLM系统。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to VLM/VLA大模型下多智能体强化学习与时态逻辑研究, especially work that connects or combines: Vision Language Models in multi-agent systems; Vision-Language-Action models for robotics; Multi-agent reinforcement learning with large models; Temporal logic specifications in reinforcement learning; Linear Temporal Logic for multi-agent coordination; Signal Temporal Logic in robotic control; Multi agent reinforcement learning using VLM and temporal logic constraints; VLA models for multi robot coordination with formal specifications; Integrating linear temporal logic with vision language foundation models; Temporal logic guided policy learning in multi agent VLM systems.
